title: UPI OC No 184 A FY 2024 25 Addendum to OC 184 Modification in UPI chargeback rules and procedures
text:
NPCI/ UPI/OC No. 184A/2024-25                                             Mar 12, 202 5  
To,  
All Members of Unified Payments Interface (UPI)   
Sub:  Addendum to OC -184 Modification in UPI chargeback rules and procedures  
 
Reference may be taken from UPI operating circular vide NPCI/UPI/OC No. 184 dated 5th Dec 
2023. Please be informed, basis the member banks feedback we are exempting capping of 
10 chargebacks (IFSC + Account Number) and 5 chargebacks ( Payer VPA to Payee VPA) for 
chargebacks raised on fraudulent transactions.  
Effective date: Exemption changes will be made in URCS w ith effect from 15th Mar 2025 . 
Please disseminate the information contained herein to the officials concerned.  
 
With warm regards  
SD/- 
Giridhar G M  
Chief – Customer Success
